userMessage: 请你联网回答：OpenAI 官方文档的主域名是什么？给我一个简短答案，并附上来源。如果当前 grounded 证据还不够，就继续调用能力，不要把 partial 直接当 completed。

answer.text:
The main domain for OpenAI's official developer documentation is `developers.openai.com`. This site serves as a central hub for product information, updates, and guides for various OpenAI features, including the Codex model.

Several sources from April 10-11, 2026, refer to OpenAI's developer documentation in the context of new features and API usa

...[truncated 586 chars]...

penai.com/codex". The OpenAI Developer Community also links to "official OpenAI docs".

core.answer: 主域名是 developers.openai.com 。来源：OpenAI Help Center 在相关说明中写到“all product information and updates for Codex moving forward will be announced on our new site: developers.openai.com/codex”，可反向确认其官方文档主域名为 developers.openai.com。

transcriptTail.text: 请你联网回答：OpenAI 官方文档的主域名是什么？给我一个简短答案，并附上来源。如果当前 grounded 证据还不够，就继续调用能力，不要把 partial 直接当 completed。

主域名是 developers.openai.com 。来源：OpenAI Help Center 在相关说明中写到“all product information and updates for Codex moving forward will be announced on our new site: developers.openai.com/codex”，可反向确认其官方文档主域名为 developers.openai.com。
